Canadian OH&S
IMPORTANT: Please make sure to include Full-Time, Part-Time, Seasonal, and Contract workers under your direct supervision at the highest point in the year.
Please enter the Average Number of Employees your company had during the given year:

Include hours worked by salaried, hourly, part-time and seasonal workers including temporary help services workers. Do not include vacation, sick leave, holidays, or any other non-work time, even if employees were paid for it. If your establishment keeps records of only the hours paid or if you have employees who are not paid by the hour, please estimate the hours that the employees actually worked. If this number isn't available, an estimate is still needed.\n\nExample: The average annual hours are 2080 for a full-time employee working 40 hours per week.
Please enter the total number of hours worked by all employees during the given year. Please round your answer to the next highest whole number.

Canada Annual Update

Are your incidents and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of incidents reported (excluding First Aid) is equal to or greater than your number of employees. \n\nPlease validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or incidents. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.

### High Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *HIGHER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.

### Low Work Hours:

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *LOWER* than the average annual hours typically worked by full-time and part-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.
